scenario:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Authorization: Digest username="Vola9*9Bj",realm="sbcdev4.com",nonce="BroadWorksXj979w5zlTyinn46BW",response="8cf961363814ecdab391effdd5cbafc7",uri="sip:4079@sbcdev4.com",algorithm=MD5,qop=auth,nc=00000017,cnonce="a9f25494d2cb47b9bbcf" Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000
ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
INVITE sip:[field1]@[field3] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Authorization: Digest username="Vola9*9Bj",realm="sbcdev4.com",nonce="BroadWorksXj97drws0T3t0t2hBW",response="fc812054a4d778a74101b8e42ced8cf8",uri="sip:4079@sbcdev4.com",algorithm=MD5,qop=auth,nc=00000001,cnonce="1bd824a8eca9cfc50f6c" Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP CSeq: 2 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
